raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Flush eye immediately with clean water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
STEP 2: Hold eyelids open and rotate eye while rinsing.
STEP 3: Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
DO NOT: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.
ESCALATE: Call emergency services or go to the ER immediately. Bring the product container/label.

immediate_steps: Flush eye immediately with clean water or saline for at least 15 minutes.
Hold eyelids open and rotate eye while rinsing.
Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do.
do_not_do: Rub the eye or use neutralizing agents.
escalate_when: Call emergency services or go to the ER immediately. Bring the product container/label.
